text_original: Got a lifetime membership but its kind of a waste. The same characters were always popping up as if no one is making fresh characters like on other apps. I took a two month break, come back and it's still the same characters popping up. Plus a lot of filters.
text_zh: 买了终身会员，但感觉有点浪费钱。总是弹出那几个同样的角色，感觉不像其他应用那样有人在创作新角色。我休息了两个月再回来，结果还是那几个角色。而且过滤限制还特别多。
reply_original:
Hi there! I'm sorry to hear you're feeling disappointed with your Lifetime membership. We actually have a "Filter" function on the homepage to help you discover different categories and tags! Also, check the "Community" tab to see bots created by other users. 

Regarding filters, we must follow Google Play policies to keep the app available.
reply_zh:
你好！很抱歉听说你对终身会员身份感到失望。实际上，我们在首页设有“筛选”功能，可以帮助你发现不同的类别和标签！此外，你也可以查看“社区”选项卡，看看其他用户创建的机器人。

关于过滤器，我们必须遵守 Google Play 的政策，以确保应用程序能够正常上架。
